text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fan letter arrives for Mejiro Palmer, so I hand it
to her in my office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Getting fan mail makes all the hard work
I put into my races worth it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No time like the present to read this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A giddy Mejiro Palmer takes the envelope, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No way! She actually wrote me a letter?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It turns out a friend she met at an unofficial race
was the one who penned the letter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She said she'd send me a letter a while back, but
didn't think she really would...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what she wrote? I bet she's just ribbing
me, but let's see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm... "I saw you tear it up at the Twinkle Series,
girl! Nice running!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
"You were like a totally different person on the
turf, unlike the nonstop yapper I know. You're
way cooler when you're not talking! ☆" See?
Takin' shots.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
"You're always going on about your explosive
breakaway and whatnot, but like..."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
"The girl I saw out there was bold and wasn't
afraid of facing a good challenge. Keep bringin'
her back, 'kay?!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, don't compliment me for real... Now this
feels like an actual fan letter from the heart...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Welp, let's start training! Throw in a few extra
laps for me today, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta get her to come watch another one of
my races so I can show her an even better
runaway slay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From then on, Mejiro Palmer puts in a noticeably
higher amount of effort during our training
sessions.
